title: Undergarden No Hearts Render
description: Removes Undergarden's heart and armor rendering layer
body:
This mod removes the hearts and armor layers added by [The Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden) mod.

It’s a great visual enhancement for instances where you want to clean up the UI without changing it in general. However, keep in mind that it can get very laggy if:
-You have tens of thousands of hearts
-You have tens of thousands of armor pieces

This mod may become less useful if:
-You have another health render mod like [Parties](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/parties) installed.

This mod fixes that and removes the render!
